name: salary-management-system-workspace
description: Salary management monorepo (Express API + React UI)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.setup: npm run db:up && npm run migrate && npm run seed -w backend -- --reset
